title: Judge-human correlation harness
hypothesis: LLM judges (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet) achieve Spearman correlation >= 0.7 with human quality judgments across rubric dimensions, validating LLM-as-judge as a scalable replacement for human eval.
control: Human ground-truth proxy (Claude Sonnet at temp=0.1, senior UX researcher persona)
variant: GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet LLMJudge backends
